title: Additional Training
intro: Committed to staying at the cutting edge of technology, I have completed professional certification programmes covering full-stack development, generative AI engineering, deep learning, cloud analytics and UX design — all from IBM and Google.

trainings.title: IBM Full-Stack JavaScript Developer Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Comprehensive programme covering the full JavaScript stack: front-end with React, back-end with Node.js and Express, databases, containers and cloud deployment. Includes capstone projects delivered as production-ready applications.

trainings.title: IBM Full Stack Software Developer Professional Certificate
trainings.description: End-to-end full-stack engineering programme covering React, Node.js, Python/Django, microservices, Kubernetes, DevOps CI/CD pipelines and cloud-native deployment on IBM Cloud and AWS.

trainings.title: IBM JavaScript Backend Developer Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Specialised back-end track: Node.js, Express, REST API design, MongoDB, authentication, serverless functions and microservices architecture.

trainings.title: IBM Front-End Developer Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Professional front-end curriculum covering React, Bootstrap, UI/UX principles, accessibility, testing and cloud deployment. Includes hands-on capstone projects.

trainings.title: Google Cloud Data Analytics Certificate
trainings.description: Hands-on training in cloud-based data analytics using BigQuery, Looker Studio and Google Cloud Platform. Covers data ingestion, transformation, SQL analytics and dashboard creation.

trainings.title: Google UX Design Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Seven-course programme covering the full UX design process: user research, wireframing, prototyping, usability testing and delivering high-fidelity designs in Figma.

trainings.title: IBM Generative AI Engineering Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Advanced programme on building generative AI applications: transformer architectures, fine-tuning LLMs, RAG pipelines with LangChain, and deploying AI-powered APIs.

trainings.title: IBM AI Engineering Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Comprehensive AI engineering curriculum: machine learning, deep neural networks, computer vision, NLP and model deployment. Includes real-world capstone projects using PyTorch and TensorFlow.

trainings.title: IBM Deep Learning with PyTorch, Keras & TensorFlow
trainings.description: Deep learning specialisation covering neural network fundamentals, CNNs, RNNs, transfer learning and model optimisation using PyTorch, Keras and TensorFlow.

trainings.title: IBM AI Developer Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Practical AI development track: building generative AI applications with Python, integrating LLM APIs, developing chatbots and AI agents, and deploying AI solutions.

trainings.title: IBM Product Manager Professional Certificate
trainings.description: Product management fundamentals: defining product strategy, working with agile teams, translating business requirements into technical roadmaps and measuring product success.

trainings.title: Google Advanced Data Analytics Certificate
trainings.description: Advanced analytics programme covering Python for data analysis, statistical methods, regression and classification models, and data-driven decision making. Includes a capstone ML project.

meta.title: Additional Training – Iliya Glazunov
meta.description: Explore Iliya Glazunov's professional certifications in full-stack JavaScript development, generative AI engineering, deep learning, cloud analytics and UX design from IBM and Google.
meta.keywords: certifications, IBM, Google, full-stack, JavaScript, generative AI, deep learning, data analytics, UX design, Coursera, Iliya Glazunov
